name: Malted Milk Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, softened butter, sour cream, eggs, and vanilla. Beat until creamy.
3. Gradually add flour, malted milk powder, baking powder, baking soda, and salt, mixing well after each addition.
4. Roll the dough into 1/4-inch thick rounds and place about 2-1/2 inch rounds on ungreased baking sheets, spacing them 2 inches apart.
5. Bake for about 10 minutes or until set and bottoms are golden brown.
6. Remove from baking sheets and cool on wire racks.
7. For frosting, combine brown sugar, butter, and milk in a medium saucepan over low heat. Cook until butter melts and sugar dissolves. Remove from heat and stir in confectioners' sugar, malted milk powder, and vanilla. Spread on cooled cookies while the frosting is still warm.
